            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"ControlNet集成失败 (0)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 5. 测试WebSocket进度更新 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"测试WebSocket进度更新..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>test_websocket<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                functionality_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"WebSocket进度更新成功 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"WebSocket进度更新失败 (0)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 6. 测试批量生成 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"测试批量生成..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            batch_result <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>test_batch_generation<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> batch_result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                functionality_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"批量生成成功 (</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>batch_result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.2f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">s) (+4)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"批量生成失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>batch_result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'error'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> (0)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"功能测试异常: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"functionality"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> functionality_score
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"functionality"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"功能完整性得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>functionality_score<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/40"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">test_api_startup</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token builtin">bool</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""测试API服务启动"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查Dockerfile</span>
            dockerfile_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"Dockerfile"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> dockerfile_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查requirements.txt</span>
            req_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"requirements.txt"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> req_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查config文件</span>
            config_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"configs"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"api_config.yaml"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> config_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 尝试导入关键模块</span>
            sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>insert<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">from</span> models<span class="token punctuation">.</span>model_manager <span class="token keyword">import</span> ModelManager
                <span class="token keyword">from</span> api<span class="token punctuation">.</span>app <span class="token keyword">import</span> app
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">True</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> ImportError <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"导入错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
                
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"API启动测试失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">test_generation</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> Dict<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""测试文本到图像生成"""</span>
        result <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"time"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 启动测试服务器（模拟）</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 在实际评估中，这里会启动一个测试服务器</span>
            
            test_prompt <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"A test image for evaluation"</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 模拟生成时间（实际实现会调用真实API）</span>
            start_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sleep<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>  <span class="token comment"># 模拟生成时间</span>
            end_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否生成了合理的结果</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 这里可以添加图像质量检查</span>
            
            result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">True</span>
            result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"time"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> end_time <span class="token operator">-</span> start_time
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">return</span> result
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">test_editing</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> Dict<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""测试图像编辑"""</span>
        result <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"time"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 模拟编辑过程</span>
            start_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sleep<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1.5</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>  <span class="token comment"># 模拟编辑时间</span>
            end_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查编辑功能是否实现</span>
            editor_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"editors"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> editor_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token comment"># 检查是否有基本的编辑类</span>
                editor_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">list</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>editor_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>glob<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"*.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>editor_files<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">True</span>
                    result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"time"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> end_time <span class="token operator">-</span> start_time
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"未找到编辑实现"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"编辑器目录不存在"</span>
                
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">return</span> result
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">test_controlnet</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token builtin">bool</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""测试ControlNet集成"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查ControlNet配置</span>
            config_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"configs"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"model_config.yaml"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> config_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>config_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                config <span class="token operator">=</span> yaml<span class="token punctuation">.</span>safe_load<span class="token punctuation">(</span>f<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否配置了ControlNet</span>
            controlnets <span class="token operator">=</span> config<span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'model'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'controlnets'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            enabled_controlnets <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>c <span class="token keyword">for</span> c <span class="token keyword">in</span> controlnets <span class="token keyword">if</span> c<span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'enabled'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>enabled_controlnets<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>  <span class="token comment"># 至少启用两个ControlNet</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"ControlNet测试失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">test_websocket</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token builtin">bool</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""测试WebSocket功能"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查WebSocket实现</span>
            api_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"api"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"app.py"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> api_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>api_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否包含WebSocket相关代码</span>
            has_websocket <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"WebSocket"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token string">"@app.websocket"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content
            has_progress <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"progress"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>lower<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> has_websocket <span class="token keyword">and</span> has_progress
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"WebSocket测试失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">test_batch_generation</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> Dict<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""测试批量生成"""</span>
        result <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"time"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查批量生成实现</span>
            generator_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"generators"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"image_generator.py"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> generator_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"生成器文件不存在"</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> result
            
            <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>generator_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否有批量生成方法</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"batch_generate"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content <span class="token keyword">or</span> <span class="token string">"batch"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>lower<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token comment"># 模拟批量生成时间</span>
                start_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sleep<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>  <span class="token comment"># 模拟批量生成时间</span>
                end_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"success"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">True</span>
                result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"time"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> end_time <span class="token operator">-</span> start_time
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"未实现批量生成"</span>
                
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            result<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">return</span> result
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_performance</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估性能指标 (30分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n"</span> <span class="token operator">+</span> <span class="token string">"="</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">40</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"评估性能指标"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"="</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">40</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        performance_score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 1. 运行性能基准测试 (15分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"运行性能基准测试..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            benchmark_results <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>run_benchmarks<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查生成时间</span>
            gen_time <span class="token operator">=</span> benchmark_results<span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"generation_time"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"mean"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> gen_time <span class="token operator">&lt;=</span> <span class="token number">10</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                performance_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">10</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"生成时间达标: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>gen_time<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.2f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">s ≤10s (+10)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">elif</span> gen_time <span class="token operator">&lt;=</span> <span class="token number">15</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                performance_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">7</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"生成时间一般: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>gen_time<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.2f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">s ≤15s (+7)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">elif</span> gen_time <span class="token operator">&lt;=</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                performance_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"生成时间较差: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>gen_time<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.2f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">s ≤20s (+4)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"生成时间不达标: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>gen_time<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.2f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">s &gt;20s (0)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查内存使用</span>
            memory_usage <span class="token operator">=</span> benchmark_results<span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"gpu_memory"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>get<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"max_allocated_gb"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">12</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> memory_usage <span class="token operator">&lt;=</span> <span class="token number">8</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                performance_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">5</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"内存使用达标: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>memory_usage<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.1f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">GB ≤8GB (+5)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">elif</span> memory_usage <span class="token operator">&lt;=</span> <span class="token number">12</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                performance_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"内存使用一般: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>memory_usage<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.1f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">GB ≤12GB (+3)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"内存使用过高: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>memory_usage<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.1f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">GB &gt;12GB (0)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 2. 检查优化实现 (15分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"检查优化实现..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            optimization_score <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>check_optimizations<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            performance_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> optimization_score
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"优化实现得分: +</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>optimization_score<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"性能测试异常: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"performance"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> performance_score
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"performance"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"性能指标得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>performance_score<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/30"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">run_benchmarks</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> Dict<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""运行性能基准测试"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 查找评估脚本</span>
            eval_script <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"scripts"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"evaluate.py"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> eval_script<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token string">"评估脚本不存在"</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 在实际评估中，这里会运行评估脚本</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 为示例，我们返回模拟结果</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
                <span class="token string">"generation_time"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
                    <span class="token string">"mean"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">8.5</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token string">"std"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">1.2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token string">"p95"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">10.2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token string">"p99"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">11.5</span>
                <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"gpu_memory"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
                    <span class="token string">"max_allocated_gb"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">7.2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token string">"reserved_gb"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">8.5</span>
                <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"throughput"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
                    <span class="token string">"images_per_minute"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">28</span>
                <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"基准测试失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"error"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">check_optimizations</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token builtin">int</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""检查优化实现 (15分)"""</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查模型管理器中的优化</span>
            model_manager_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"models"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"model_manager.py"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> model_manager_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>model_manager_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查各种优化</span>
                optimizations <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
                    <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"注意力切片"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"enable_attention_slicing"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"xFormers优化"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"enable_xformers_memory_efficient_attention"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"半精度推理"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"torch.float16"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"模型缓存"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"cache"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                    <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"内存管理"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"empty_cache"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                
                <span class="token keyword">for</span> name<span class="token punctuation">,</span> keyword<span class="token punctuation">,</span> points <span class="token keyword">in</span> optimizations<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">if</span> keyword <span class="token keyword">in</span> content<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        score <span class="token operator">+=</span> points
                        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  ✅ 找到</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>name<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">优化"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  ❌ 未找到</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>name<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">优化"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 额外检查Docker优化</span>
            dockerfile_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"Dockerfile"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> dockerfile_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>dockerfile_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    docker_content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"--no-cache-dir"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> docker_content<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"  ✅ Docker构建优化"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"multistage"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> docker_content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>lower<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"  ✅ Docker多阶段构建"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"优化检查失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">15</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>  <span class="token comment"># 最多15分</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_code_quality</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估代码质量 (15分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n"</span> <span class="token operator">+</span> <span class="token string">"="</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">40</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"评估代码质量"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"="</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">40</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        code_quality_score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 1. 运行单元测试 (5分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"运行单元测试..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            test_results <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>run_unit_tests<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> test_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"passed"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                code_quality_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">5</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"单元测试通过: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>test_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'passed'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>test_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'total'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> (+5)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"单元测试失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>test_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'passed'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>test_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'total'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> (0)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 2. 检查代码规范 (5分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"检查代码规范..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            style_score <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>check_code_style<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            code_quality_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> style_score
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"代码规范得分: +</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>style_score<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 3. 检查文档字符串 (5分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"检查文档字符串..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            doc_score <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>check_documentation_quality<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            code_quality_score <span class="token operator">+=</span> doc_score
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"文档字符串得分: +</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>doc_score<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"代码质量检查异常: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"code_quality"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> code_quality_score
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"code_quality"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"代码质量得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>code_quality_score<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/15"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">run_unit_tests</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> Dict<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""运行单元测试"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            test_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"tests"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> test_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"total"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"passed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"failed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 统计测试文件</span>
            test_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">list</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>test_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>glob<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"test_*.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> test_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"total"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"passed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"failed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 在实际评估中，这里会运行pytest</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 为示例，我们返回模拟结果</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
                <span class="token string">"total"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">15</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"passed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">12</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"failed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"coverage"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0.80</span>
            <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"单元测试运行失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">"total"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"passed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"failed"</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">check_code_style</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token builtin">int</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""检查代码规范 (5分)"""</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查关键文件的代码质量</span>
            key_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
                <span class="token string">"src/models/model_manager.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"src/generators/image_generator.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"src/api/app.py"</span>
            <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">for</span> file_path <span class="token keyword">in</span> key_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                full_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> file_path
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> full_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>full_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 简单检查代码质量指标</span>
                    lines <span class="token operator">=</span> content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>split<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'\n'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 检查行长度（粗略）</span>
                    long_lines <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> line <span class="token keyword">in</span> lines <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>line<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token number">100</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">if</span> long_lines <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token builtin">max</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>lines<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.1</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>  <span class="token comment"># 少于10%的行过长</span>
                        score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 检查导入组织</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"import"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token string">"from"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        <span class="token comment"># 检查是否按标准组织导入</span>
                        imports_section <span class="token operator">=</span> content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>split<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'\n\n'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                        <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"import "</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> imports_section<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                            score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 检查类型提示</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"def "</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token string">"-&gt;"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> content<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 平均分配分数</span>
            score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score <span class="token operator">//</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>key_files<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">5</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">if</span> key_files <span class="token keyword">else</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"代码风格检查失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">return</span> score
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">check_documentation_quality</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token builtin">int</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""检查文档字符串质量 (5分)"""</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查关键类和方法是否有文档字符串</span>
            key_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
                <span class="token string">"src/models/model_manager.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
                <span class="token string">"src/generators/image_generator.py"</span>
            <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">for</span> file_path <span class="token keyword">in</span> key_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                full_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> file_path
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> full_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>full_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 统计类和方法</span>
                    lines <span class="token operator">=</span> content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>split<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'\n'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    
                    class_count <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> line <span class="token keyword">in</span> lines <span class="token keyword">if</span> line<span class="token punctuation">.</span>strip<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>startswith<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"class "</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    method_count <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> line <span class="token keyword">in</span> lines <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"def "</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> line <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token string">"("</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> line <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token string">"):"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> line<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 检查文档字符串</span>
                    docstring_count <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> line <span class="token keyword">in</span> lines <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">'"""'</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> line <span class="token keyword">or</span> <span class="token string">"'''"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> line<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    
                    <span class="token comment"># 如果有足够的文档字符串</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">if</span> docstring_count <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>class_count <span class="token operator">+</span> method_count<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">0.5</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>  <span class="token comment"># 至少50%</span>
                        score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">elif</span> docstring_count <span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 平均分配分数</span>
            score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">5</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"文档检查失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">return</span> score
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_documentation</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估文档和部署 (15分)"""</span>
