        required_dirs <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"src"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"data"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"tests"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"docs"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"config"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        required_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
            <span class="token string">"app.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            <span class="token string">"requirements.txt"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            <span class="token string">"README.md"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            <span class="token string">"src/statistics.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            <span class="token string">"src/visualization.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            <span class="token string">"data/sleep_screen_data.csv"</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 检查目录</span>
        existing_dirs <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        <span class="token keyword">for</span> dir_name <span class="token keyword">in</span> required_dirs<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            dir_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> dir_name
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> dir_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">and</span> dir_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>is_dir<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                existing_dirs<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>dir_name<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>  <span class="token comment"># 每个目录1分</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"缺少目录: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>dir_name<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 检查文件</span>
        existing_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        <span class="token keyword">for</span> file_path <span class="token keyword">in</span> required_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            full_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> file_path
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> full_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                existing_files<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>file_path<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>  <span class="token comment"># 每个文件1分</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"缺少文件: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>file_path<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 额外加分：有合理的.gitignore</span>
        <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">".gitignore"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"包含.gitignore文件 (+2)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 额外加分：有setup.py或pyproject.toml</span>
        setup_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"setup.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"pyproject.toml"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"setup.cfg"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        <span class="token keyword">for</span> setup_file <span class="token keyword">in</span> setup_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> setup_file<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"包含</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>setup_file<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> (+1)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">break</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"project_structure"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">15</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"project_structure"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  项目结构得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'project_structure'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'score'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/15"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_data_processing</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估数据处理 (20分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n📊 评估数据处理..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查数据文件</span>
            data_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"data"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"sleep_screen_data.csv"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> data_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"数据文件不存在"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"data_processing"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
                self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"data_processing"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
                <span class="token keyword">return</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 加载数据</span>
            df <span class="token operator">=</span> pd<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read_csv<span class="token punctuation">(</span>data_path<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查数据完整性 (5分)</span>
            expected_columns <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token string">'day'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'screen_time_h'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'sleep_time_h'</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span>
            actual_columns <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">set</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">.</span>columns<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> expected_columns<span class="token punctuation">.</span>issubset<span class="token punctuation">(</span>actual_columns<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">5</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"数据列完整 (+5)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"数据列不完整，期望</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>expected_columns<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">，实际</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>actual_columns<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查数据记录数 (5分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">==</span> <span class="token number">28</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">5</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"数据记录数正确 (28条) (+5)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"数据记录数不正确: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">条"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查数据有效性 (5分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> df<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_time_h'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">0</span> <span class="token keyword">and</span> df<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'sleep_time_h'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">5</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"数据值有效 (非负) (+5)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"数据包含负值"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查数据清洗功能 (5分)</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 尝试导入数据处理模块</span>
            sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>insert<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">from</span> data_loader <span class="token keyword">import</span> DataLoader
                has_data_loader <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">True</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> ImportError<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                has_data_loader <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> has_data_loader<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">5</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"包含数据加载和清洗模块 (+5)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"缺少数据加载模块"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"数据处理评估错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"data_processing"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"data_processing"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  数据处理得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'data_processing'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'score'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/20"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_statistical_analysis</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估统计分析 (25分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n🧮 评估统计分析..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 加载数据</span>
            data_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"data"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"sleep_screen_data.csv"</span>
            df <span class="token operator">=</span> pd<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read_csv<span class="token punctuation">(</span>data_path<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 尝试导入统计模块</span>
            sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>insert<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">from</span> statistics <span class="token keyword">import</span> SleepScreenAnalyzer
                
                <span class="token comment"># 创建分析器</span>
                analyzer <span class="token operator">=</span> SleepScreenAnalyzer<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 测试描述性统计 (5分)</span>
                desc_stats <span class="token operator">=</span> analyzer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>descriptive_statistics<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查屏幕时间均值</span>
                screen_mean <span class="token operator">=</span> desc_stats<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>screen_mean <span class="token operator">-</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"屏幕时间均值计算正确 (+2)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"屏幕时间均值计算错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>screen_mean<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查睡眠时间均值</span>
                sleep_mean <span class="token operator">=</span> desc_stats<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'sleep_time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>sleep_mean <span class="token operator">-</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'sleep_mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"睡眠时间均值计算正确 (+2)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"睡眠时间均值计算错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>sleep_mean<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'sleep_mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查标准差计算 (3分)</span>
                screen_std <span class="token operator">=</span> desc_stats<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'std'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                sleep_std <span class="token operator">=</span> desc_stats<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'sleep_time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'std'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 计算参考标准差（从方差开方）</span>
                ref_screen_std <span class="token operator">=</span> np<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sqrt<span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_var_unbiased'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                ref_sleep_std <span class="token operator">=</span> np<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sqrt<span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'sleep_var_unbiased'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>screen_std <span class="token operator">-</span> ref_screen_std<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1.5</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"屏幕时间标准差计算正确 (+1.5)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"屏幕时间标准差计算错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>screen_std<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>ref_screen_std<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>sleep_std <span class="token operator">-</span> ref_sleep_std<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1.5</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"睡眠时间标准差计算正确 (+1.5)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"睡眠时间标准差计算错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>sleep_std<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>ref_sleep_std<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 测试参数估计 (5分)</span>
                param_est <span class="token operator">=</span> analyzer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>parameter_estimation<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查均值估计</span>
                screen_mean_est <span class="token operator">=</span> param_est<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'point_estimate'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>screen_mean_est <span class="token operator">-</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_mean'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"屏幕时间均值估计正确 (+2)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查方差估计（无偏）</span>
                screen_var_est <span class="token operator">=</span> param_est<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_time'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'point_estimate'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'variance_unbiased'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>screen_var_est <span class="token operator">-</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_var_unbiased'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"屏幕时间无偏方差估计正确 (+3)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"屏幕时间方差估计错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>screen_var_est<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'screen_var_unbiased'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 测试相关性分析 (5分)</span>
                corr_analysis <span class="token operator">=</span> analyzer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>correlation_analysis<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查相关系数</span>
                corr_coef <span class="token operator">=</span> corr_analysis<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'pearson_correlation'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'coefficient'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>corr_coef <span class="token operator">-</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'correlation_coef'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.001</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"相关系数计算正确 (+3)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"相关系数计算错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>corr_coef<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.5f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'correlation_coef'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.5f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 检查P值</span>
                p_value <span class="token operator">=</span> corr_analysis<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'pearson_correlation'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'p_value'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">abs</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>p_value <span class="token operator">-</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'correlation_p_value'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&lt;</span> <span class="token number">0.01</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">2</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"相关性P值计算正确 (+2)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"相关性P值计算错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>p_value<span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> vs </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>reference_results<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'correlation_p_value'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token format-spec">.3f</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 测试正态性检验 (4分)</span>
                normality <span class="token operator">=</span> analyzer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>normality_tests<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">'screen_time'</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> normality <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token string">'sleep_time'</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> normality<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"正态性检验功能完整 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"正态性检验功能不完整"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
                <span class="token comment"># 测试报告生成 (3分)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    report <span class="token operator">=</span> analyzer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>generate_summary_report<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">'conclusions'</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> report <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>report<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'conclusions'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                        details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"报告生成功能完整 (+3)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                    <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                        details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"报告生成功能不完整"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">except</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"报告生成功能异常"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> ImportError <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"无法导入统计模块: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"统计分析测试异常: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"统计分析评估错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"statistical_analysis"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">25</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"statistical_analysis"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  统计分析得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'statistical_analysis'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'score'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/25"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_visualization</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估可视化功能 (20分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n📈 评估可视化功能..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查可视化模块</span>
            sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>insert<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                <span class="token keyword">from</span> visualization <span class="token keyword">import</span> SleepScreenVisualizer
                has_visualizer <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">True</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> ImportError<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                has_visualizer <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">False</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> has_visualizer<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"可视化模块不存在"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"visualization"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
                self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"visualization"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
                <span class="token keyword">return</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 加载数据</span>
            data_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"data"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"sleep_screen_data.csv"</span>
            df <span class="token operator">=</span> pd<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read_csv<span class="token punctuation">(</span>data_path<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 创建可视化器</span>
            visualizer <span class="token operator">=</span> SleepScreenVisualizer<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 测试时序图生成 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                fig1 <span class="token operator">=</span> visualizer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>create_time_series_plot<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"时序图生成成功 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"时序图生成失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 测试直方图生成 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                fig2 <span class="token operator">=</span> visualizer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>create_histograms<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"直方图生成成功 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"直方图生成失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 测试箱形图生成 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                fig3 <span class="token operator">=</span> visualizer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>create_box_plot<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"箱形图生成成功 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"箱形图生成失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 测试散点图生成 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                fig4 <span class="token operator">=</span> visualizer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>create_scatter_plot<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"散点图生成成功 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"散点图生成失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 测试所有图表生成 (4分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                figs <span class="token operator">=</span> visualizer<span class="token punctuation">.</span>create_all_plots<span class="token punctuation">(</span>df<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">isinstance</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>figs<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">dict</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>figs<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">4</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"所有图表生成功能完整 (+4)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                    details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"所有图表生成功能不完整"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"所有图表生成失败: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>e<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"可视化评估错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"visualization"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"visualization"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  可视化功能得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'visualization'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'score'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/20"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_application_ui</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估应用界面 (10分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n🎨 评估应用界面..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token keyword">try</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token comment"># 检查主应用文件</span>
            app_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"app.py"</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">not</span> app_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"主应用文件不存在"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
                self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"application_ui"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
                self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"application_ui"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
                <span class="token keyword">return</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>app_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> encoding<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">'utf-8'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                app_content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否使用Streamlit (3分)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token string">"import streamlit"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> app_content <span class="token keyword">or</span> <span class="token string">"import streamlit as st"</span> <span class="token keyword">in</span> app_content<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"使用Streamlit框架 (+3)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"未使用Streamlit框架"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否有UI组件 (3分)</span>
            ui_keywords <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"st.title"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.header"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.subheader"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.write"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> 
                          <span class="token string">"st.dataframe"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.plotly_chart"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.pyplot"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
            ui_count <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> keyword <span class="token keyword">in</span> ui_keywords <span class="token keyword">if</span> keyword <span class="token keyword">in</span> app_content<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> ui_count <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"包含多种UI组件 (</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>ui_count<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">种) (+3)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"UI组件较少: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>ui_count<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">种"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查是否有交互功能 (4分)</span>
            interactive_keywords <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"st.slider"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.selectbox"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.button"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> 
                                   <span class="token string">"st.file_uploader"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"st.text_input"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
            interactive_count <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> keyword <span class="token keyword">in</span> interactive_keywords <span class="token keyword">if</span> keyword <span class="token keyword">in</span> app_content<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> interactive_count <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"包含交互功能 (</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>interactive_count<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">种) (+4)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"交互功能较少: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>interactive_count<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">种"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
        <span class="token keyword">except</span> Exception <span class="token keyword">as</span> e<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"应用界面评估错误: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span><span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>e<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"application_ui"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"score"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">min</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">10</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"application_ui"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"details"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> details
        
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"  应用界面得分: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'application_ui'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">'score'</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/10"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
    
    <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">evaluate_documentation</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
        <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""评估文档 (10分)"""</span>
        <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\n📚 评估文档..."</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        details <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 检查README.md (4分)</span>
        readme_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"README.md"</span>
        <span class="token keyword">if</span> readme_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>readme_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> encoding<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">'utf-8'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                readme_content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token comment"># 检查README内容</span>
            required_sections <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string">"安装"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"使用"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"功能"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"运行"</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
            found_sections <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">sum</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span> <span class="token keyword">for</span> section <span class="token keyword">in</span> required_sections <span class="token keyword">if</span> section <span class="token keyword">in</span> readme_content<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> found_sections <span class="token operator">&gt;=</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">4</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"README内容完整 (</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>found_sections<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/4个部分) (+4)"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string-interpolation"><span class="token string">f"README内容不完整: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token punctuation">{</span>found_sections<span class="token punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">/4个部分"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"缺少README.md文件"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 检查API文档 (3分)</span>
        api_doc_path <span class="token operator">=</span> self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"docs"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"API_DOCUMENTATION.md"</span>
        <span class="token keyword">if</span> api_doc_path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>api_doc_path<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'r'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> encoding<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">'utf-8'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                api_doc_content <span class="token operator">=</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>read<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>api_doc_content<span class="token punctuation">.</span>split<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">&gt;</span> <span class="token number">200</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>  <span class="token comment"># 至少有200个词</span>
                score <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">3</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"API文档完整 (+3)"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
            <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
                details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"API文档内容过少"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            details<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"缺少API文档"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        
        <span class="token comment"># 检查代码注释 (3分)</span>
        code_files <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
            self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"statistics.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"src"</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"visualization.py"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            self<span class="token punctuation">.</span>submission_path <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token string">"app.py"</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
        
        docstring_count <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
        <span class="token keyword">for</span> code_file <span class="token keyword">in</span> code_files<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
            <span class="token keyword">if</span> code_file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
